title: storage — Eloquent observers
description: Three observers hooking the three primary entities. FileObserver handles the upload lifecycle + refcount management. FileVariantObserver keeps tenant_id denormalised in sync. ChunkedUploadObserver enforces the state machine + reservation lifecycle.

hooks.creating: Stamp tenant_id from RequestContext when absent. Generate ULID with prefix `fil_`. Compute + store sha256 by streaming the byte payload. Determine + store `disk` + `path` per the ContentAddressableStore routing. Increment reference_count on the physical blob if already present.
hooks.created: Fire FileUploading (afterCommit=false variant) so same-transaction subs land atomically. Queue ScanFileForVirusesJob + GenerateFileVariantsJob (afterCommit).
hooks.updating: Refuse mutations to immutable fields (tenant_id, sha256, disk, path, kind, size_bytes, mime_type). Allow: name, visibility, metadata, custom_properties, archived_at.
hooks.deleting: Refuse hard delete when reference_count > 1 UNLESS explicit cascade context is set. On soft-delete, revoke every active SignedUrlAudit for the file (bulk update).

hooks.creating: Stamp tenant_id from parent File. Generate ULID with prefix `fvr_`.
hooks.created: Append variant_key to parent File.generated_variant_keys. Fire FileVariantGenerated. Check if every variant in the file's kind recipe is present; if yes, fire FileVariantsCompleted.

hooks.creating: Stamp tenant_id + owner_id from RequestContext. Generate ULID with prefix `cup_`. Reserve total_size_bytes against `storage.bytes.consumed` entitlement (fails-fast on overquota).
hooks.updating: Enforce state machine transitions. Refuse illegal transitions (e.g. completed -> uploading). Update finalized_at on transition to a terminal state.
hooks.updated: On state transition to `completed`: fire ChunkedUploadCompleted + emit companion FileUploaded on the resulting_file_id. On transition to `aborted` or `expired`: release the quota reservation + fire ChunkedUploadAborted.
